calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Granting Defendants Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Attorney, Ross J. Psyhogios of JC Jones/Clifford (888-625-2251), appears for plaintiffs/opposing parties, Gladys Ticas and Ana Sanchez

Attorney, Gary Gallawa of John A. Biard Law Offices (916-638-6610), appears telephonically for defendants/moving parties, Sheryl Reuben and James Reuben

Court hears from both sides and vacates the tentative ruling. The court rules as follows.

DEFENDANTS SHERYL REUBEN and JAMES REUBEN'S Motion For An Order Granting Defendants Leave To File Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. Court allows for the leave to file the cross-complaint and recognizing the only relevance is in order to shift, if it happens, some of the economic damages from defendants to Ms. Ticas. Counsel for the moving party shall prepare and submit a written order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Set For Trial On Nov-28-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
